---
title: "kmer_histograms"
author: "Joanna Yeung"
date: "2025-05-29"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

# run k-mer analysis script for different sized kmers of FCR monomers from Smith et al, Genome Res 2021: 
```{bash}
cd /lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/5mers
sbatch -p hpc_l40_a --array=1-9 --export=inputfiles=/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Justin_ATAC_pipeline/atac_2_fastq_align/inputfiles_R1.txt,samplelist=/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Justin_ATAC_pipeline/atac_2_fastq_align/samplenames.txt,outdir=/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/5mers array_5mer_count.sh

cd /lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/10mers
sbatch --array=1-9 --export=inputfiles=/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Justin_ATAC_pipeline/atac_2_fastq_align/inputfiles_R1.txt,samplelist=/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Justin_ATAC_pipeline/atac_2_fastq_align/samplenames.txt,outdir=/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/10mers array_10mer_count.sh

cd /lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/15mers
sbatch -p hpc_l40_a --array=1-9 --export=inputfiles=/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Justin_ATAC_pipeline/atac_2_fastq_align/inputfiles_R1.txt,samplelist=/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Justin_ATAC_pipeline/atac_2_fastq_align/samplenames.txt,outdir=/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/15mers array_15mer_count.sh

cd /lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/20mers
sbatch -p hpc_l40_a --array=1-9 --export=inputfiles=/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Justin_ATAC_pipeline/atac_2_fastq_align/inputfiles_R1.txt,samplelist=/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Justin_ATAC_pipeline/atac_2_fastq_align/samplenames.txt,outdir=/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/20mers array_20mer_count.sh

cd /lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/25mers
sbatch -p hpc_l40_a --array=1-9 --export=inputfiles=/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Justin_ATAC_pipeline/atac_2_fastq_align/inputfiles_R1.txt,samplelist=/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Justin_ATAC_pipeline/atac_2_fastq_align/samplenames.txt,outdir=/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/25mers array_25mer_count.sh
```

# calculate kmer frequency
```{bash}
cd /lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/5mers
bash calculate_kmer_freq_reads_summary.sh

cd /lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/10mers
bash calculate_kmer_freq_reads_summary.sh

cd /lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/15mers
bash calculate_kmer_freq_reads_summary.sh

cd /lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/20mers
bash calculate_kmer_freq_reads_summary.sh

cd /lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/25mers
bash calculate_kmer_freq_reads_summary.sh
```
```{r 25mers}
setwd("/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/25mers")
kmer_summary <- dir(pattern="summary.tsv")
total_reads <- c("atacHAK034"=73824514, "atacHAK035"=53748309, "atacHAK036"=64541163, "atacHAK040"=49647880, "atacHAK041"=67337271, "atacHAK042"=65405728, "atacHAK043"=124942005, "atacHAK044"=142963808, "atacHAK045"=89210475)
hist <- list()
for(i in 1:length(kmer_summary)){
        hist[[i]] <- read.table(kmer_summary[i], header=T, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
        hist[[i]]<- hist[[i]][!hist[[i]]$kmer_frequencies %in% "num_kmers_matched", ]
        hist[[i]]$kmer_frequencies <- as.numeric(hist[[i]]$kmer_frequencies)
        hist[[i]]$Percent_total_reads <- (hist[[i]]$Number_of_reads/total_reads[i])*100
        hist[[i]]$sample <- names(total_reads)[i]
}
names(hist) <- names(total_reads) 

hist_merged <- do.call(rbind, hist)
hist_merged$sample <- factor(hist_merged$sample, levels=names(hist))
hist_merged$Condition <- ifelse(hist_merged$sample %in% names(hist)[c(1,4,7)], "Mitosis_WT", ifelse(hist_merged$sample %in% names(hist)[c(2,5,8)], "Mitosis_43AMut", "Mitosis_HIDMut"))

#brewer.pal(9, "PuRd")
#brewer.pal(9, "Greens")
#brewer.pal(9, "Greys")
 
library(ggplot2)
pdf_dir <- "/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/Figures"
colors <- c("#A1D99B","pink1","navajowhite2", "#1B9E77","#E7298A", "#A6761D", "#00441B","#980043", "saddlebrown")
pdf(paste0(pdf_dir, "/M_WTvs43AvsHID_25mer_freq_in_dedup_fastq-reads.pdf"), width=8, height=4)
ggplot(hist_merged[!hist_merged$kmer_frequencies == 0, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, fill=sample, alpha=0.3), color="black")+
        geom_bar(stat="identity", position="identity",  color="black", size=0.1)+
        scale_fill_manual(values=colors)+
        ylim(0,0.03)+
        facet_wrap(~Condition)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 25-mers found")+
        theme_minimal()
ggplot(hist_merged[!hist_merged$kmer_frequencies == 0, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, fill=sample))+
        geom_bar(stat="identity", size=0.1,  color="black")+
        scale_fill_manual(values=colors)+
        ylim(0,0.03)+
        facet_wrap(Condition~sample)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 25-mers found")+
        theme_minimal()
ggplot(hist_merged[!hist_merged$kmer_frequencies == 0, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, color=sample,))+
        geom_line(stat="identity", position="identity", size=1)+
        scale_color_manual(values=colors)+
        ylim(0,0.03)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 25-mers found")+
        theme_minimal()
ggplot(hist_merged[hist_merged$kmer_frequencies >= 5, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, color=sample,))+
        geom_line(stat="identity", position="identity", size=1)+
        scale_color_manual(values=colors)+
        ylim(0,0.03)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 25-mers found >= 5")+
        theme_minimal()
dev.off()

Reads_with_kmers_stats <- lapply(hist, function(x){percent_no_kmers_reads <- x[x$kmer_frequencies ==0, ]$Percent_total_reads
                        percent_kmer_reads <- 100-percent_no_kmers_reads
                        num_kmer_reads <- sum(x[!x$kmer_frequencies ==0, ]$Number_of_reads)
                        df <- data.frame(Percent_kmer_reads=percent_kmer_reads, Number_of_kmer_reads=num_kmer_reads)
                        return(df)
                        })
Reads_with_kmers_stats <- do.call(rbind, Reads_with_kmers_stats)
Reads_with_kmers_stats$total_reads <- total_reads
Reads_with_kmers_stats 
```

```{r 10mers}
setwd("/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/10mers")
kmer_summary <- dir(pattern="summary.tsv")
hist <- list()
for(i in 1:length(kmer_summary)){
        hist[[i]] <- read.table(kmer_summary[i], header=T, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
        hist[[i]]<- hist[[i]][!hist[[i]]$kmer_frequencies %in% "num_kmers_matched", ]
        hist[[i]]$kmer_frequencies <- as.numeric(hist[[i]]$kmer_frequencies)
        hist[[i]]$Percent_total_reads <- (hist[[i]]$Number_of_reads/total_reads[i])*100
        hist[[i]]$sample <- names(total_reads)[i]
}
names(hist) <- names(total_reads) 

hist_merged <- do.call(rbind, hist)
hist_merged$sample <- factor(hist_merged$sample, levels=names(hist))
hist_merged$Condition <- ifelse(hist_merged$sample %in% names(hist)[c(1,4,7)], "Mitosis_WT", ifelse(hist_merged$sample %in% names(hist)[c(2,5,8)], "Mitosis_43AMut", "Mitosis_HIDMut"))

#brewer.pal(9, "PuRd")
#brewer.pal(9, "Greens")
#brewer.pal(9, "Greys")
 
library(ggplot2)
pdf_dir <- "/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/Figures"
pdf(paste0(pdf_dir, "/M_WTvs43AvsHID_10mer_freq_in_dedup_fastq-reads.pdf"), width=8, height=4)
ggplot(hist_merged[!hist_merged$kmer_frequencies == 0, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, fill=sample, alpha=0.3), color="black")+
        geom_bar(stat="identity", position="identity",  color="black", size=0.1)+
        scale_fill_manual(values=colors)+
        facet_wrap(~Condition)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 10-mers found")+
        theme_minimal()
ggplot(hist_merged[!hist_merged$kmer_frequencies == 0, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, fill=sample))+
        geom_bar(stat="identity", size=0.1,  color="black")+
        scale_fill_manual(values=colors)+
        facet_wrap(Condition~sample)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 10-mers found")+
        theme_minimal()
ggplot(hist_merged[!hist_merged$kmer_frequencies == 0, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, color=sample,))+
        geom_line(stat="identity", position="identity", size=1)+
        scale_color_manual(values=colors)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 10-mers found")+
        theme_minimal()
ggplot(hist_merged[hist_merged$kmer_frequencies >= 5, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, color=sample,))+
        geom_line(stat="identity", position="identity", size=1)+
        scale_color_manual(values=colors)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 10-mers found >= 5")+
        theme_minimal()
dev.off()

Reads_with_kmers_stats <- lapply(hist, function(x){percent_no_kmers_reads <- x[x$kmer_frequencies ==0, ]$Percent_total_reads
                        percent_kmer_reads <- 100-percent_no_kmers_reads
                        num_kmer_reads <- sum(x[!x$kmer_frequencies ==0, ]$Number_of_reads)
                        df <- data.frame(Percent_kmer_reads=percent_kmer_reads, Number_of_kmer_reads=num_kmer_reads)
                        return(df)
                        })
Reads_with_kmers_stats <- do.call(rbind, Reads_with_kmers_stats)
Reads_with_kmers_stats$total_reads <- total_reads
Reads_with_kmers_stats
```


```{r 15mers}
setwd("/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/15mers")
kmer_summary <- dir(pattern="summary.tsv")
hist <- list()
for(i in 1:length(kmer_summary)){
        hist[[i]] <- read.table(kmer_summary[i], header=T, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
        hist[[i]]<- hist[[i]][!hist[[i]]$kmer_frequencies %in% "num_kmers_matched", ]
        hist[[i]]$kmer_frequencies <- as.numeric(hist[[i]]$kmer_frequencies)
        hist[[i]]$Percent_total_reads <- (hist[[i]]$Number_of_reads/total_reads[i])*100
        hist[[i]]$sample <- names(total_reads)[i]
}
names(hist) <- names(total_reads) 

hist_merged <- do.call(rbind, hist)
hist_merged$sample <- factor(hist_merged$sample, levels=names(hist))
hist_merged$Condition <- ifelse(hist_merged$sample %in% names(hist)[c(1,4,7)], "Mitosis_WT", ifelse(hist_merged$sample %in% names(hist)[c(2,5,8)], "Mitosis_43AMut", "Mitosis_HIDMut"))

#brewer.pal(9, "PuRd")
#brewer.pal(9, "Greens")
#brewer.pal(9, "Greys")
 
library(ggplot2)
pdf_dir <- "/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/Figures"
pdf(paste0(pdf_dir, "/M_WTvs43AvsHID_15mer_freq_in_dedup_fastq-reads.pdf"), width=8, height=4)
ggplot(hist_merged[!hist_merged$kmer_frequencies == 0, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, fill=sample, alpha=0.3), color="black")+
        geom_bar(stat="identity", position="identity",  color="black", size=0.1)+
        scale_fill_manual(values=colors)+
        facet_wrap(~Condition)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 15-mers found")+
        theme_minimal()
ggplot(hist_merged[!hist_merged$kmer_frequencies == 0, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, fill=sample))+
        geom_bar(stat="identity", size=0.1,  color="black")+
        scale_fill_manual(values=colors)+
        facet_wrap(Condition~sample)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 15-mers found")+
        theme_minimal()
ggplot(hist_merged[!hist_merged$kmer_frequencies == 0, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, color=sample,))+
        geom_line(stat="identity", position="identity", size=1)+
        scale_color_manual(values=colors)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 15-mers found")+
        theme_minimal()
ggplot(hist_merged[hist_merged$kmer_frequencies >= 5, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, color=sample,))+
        geom_line(stat="identity", position="identity", size=1)+
        scale_color_manual(values=colors)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 15-mers found >= 5")+
        theme_minimal()
dev.off()

Reads_with_kmers_stats <- lapply(hist, function(x){percent_no_kmers_reads <- x[x$kmer_frequencies ==0, ]$Percent_total_reads
                        percent_kmer_reads <- 100-percent_no_kmers_reads
                        num_kmer_reads <- sum(x[!x$kmer_frequencies ==0, ]$Number_of_reads)
                        df <- data.frame(Percent_kmer_reads=percent_kmer_reads, Number_of_kmer_reads=num_kmer_reads)
                        return(df)
                        })
Reads_with_kmers_stats <- do.call(rbind, Reads_with_kmers_stats)
Reads_with_kmers_stats$total_reads <- total_reads
Reads_with_kmers_stats
```

```{r 5mers}
setwd("/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/5mers")
kmer_summary <- dir(pattern="summary.tsv")
hist <- list()
for(i in 1:length(kmer_summary)){
        hist[[i]] <- read.table(kmer_summary[i], header=T, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
        hist[[i]]<- hist[[i]][!hist[[i]]$kmer_frequencies %in% "num_kmers_matched", ]
        hist[[i]]$kmer_frequencies <- as.numeric(hist[[i]]$kmer_frequencies)
        hist[[i]]$Percent_total_reads <- (hist[[i]]$Number_of_reads/total_reads[i])*100
        hist[[i]]$sample <- names(total_reads)[i]
}
names(hist) <- names(total_reads) 

hist_merged <- do.call(rbind, hist)
hist_merged$sample <- factor(hist_merged$sample, levels=names(hist))
hist_merged$Condition <- ifelse(hist_merged$sample %in% names(hist)[c(1,4,7)], "Mitosis_WT", ifelse(hist_merged$sample %in% names(hist)[c(2,5,8)], "Mitosis_43AMut", "Mitosis_HIDMut"))

#brewer.pal(9, "PuRd")
#brewer.pal(9, "Greens")
#brewer.pal(9, "Greys")
 
library(ggplot2)
pdf_dir <- "/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/Figures"
pdf(paste0(pdf_dir, "/M_WTvs43AvsHID_5mer_freq_in_dedup_fastq-reads.pdf"), width=8, height=4)
ggplot(hist_merged[!hist_merged$kmer_frequencies == 0, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, fill=sample, alpha=0.3), color="black")+
        geom_bar(stat="identity", position="identity",  color="black", size=0.1)+
        scale_fill_manual(values=colors)+
        facet_wrap(~Condition)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 5-mers found")+
        theme_minimal()
ggplot(hist_merged[!hist_merged$kmer_frequencies == 0, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, fill=sample))+
        geom_bar(stat="identity", size=0.1,  color="black")+
        scale_fill_manual(values=colors)+
        facet_wrap(Condition~sample)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 5-mers found")+
        theme_minimal()
ggplot(hist_merged[!hist_merged$kmer_frequencies == 0, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, color=sample,))+
        geom_line(stat="identity", position="identity", size=1)+
        scale_color_manual(values=colors)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 5-mers found")+
        theme_minimal()
ggplot(hist_merged[hist_merged$kmer_frequencies >= 5, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, color=sample,))+
        geom_line(stat="identity", position="identity", size=1)+
        scale_color_manual(values=colors)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 5-mers found >= 5")+
        theme_minimal()
dev.off()

Reads_with_kmers_stats <- lapply(hist, function(x){percent_no_kmers_reads <- x[x$kmer_frequencies ==0, ]$Percent_total_reads
                        percent_kmer_reads <- 100-percent_no_kmers_reads
                        num_kmer_reads <- sum(x[!x$kmer_frequencies ==0, ]$Number_of_reads)
                        df <- data.frame(Percent_kmer_reads=percent_kmer_reads, Number_of_kmer_reads=num_kmer_reads)
                        return(df)
                        })
Reads_with_kmers_stats <- do.call(rbind, Reads_with_kmers_stats)
Reads_with_kmers_stats$total_reads <- total_reads
Reads_with_kmers_stats
```

```{r 20mers}
setwd("/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/20mers")
kmer_summary <- dir(pattern="summary.tsv")
hist <- list()
for(i in 1:length(kmer_summary)){
        hist[[i]] <- read.table(kmer_summary[i], header=T, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
        hist[[i]]<- hist[[i]][!hist[[i]]$kmer_frequencies %in% "num_kmers_matched", ]
        hist[[i]]$kmer_frequencies <- as.numeric(hist[[i]]$kmer_frequencies)
        hist[[i]]$Percent_total_reads <- (hist[[i]]$Number_of_reads/total_reads[i])*100
        hist[[i]]$sample <- names(total_reads)[i]
}
names(hist) <- names(total_reads) 

hist_merged <- do.call(rbind, hist)
hist_merged$sample <- factor(hist_merged$sample, levels=names(hist))
hist_merged$Condition <- ifelse(hist_merged$sample %in% names(hist)[c(1,4,7)], "Mitosis_WT", ifelse(hist_merged$sample %in% names(hist)[c(2,5,8)], "Mitosis_43AMut", "Mitosis_HIDMut"))

#brewer.pal(9, "PuRd")
#brewer.pal(9, "Greens")
#brewer.pal(9, "Greys")
 
library(ggplot2)
pdf_dir <- "/lustre/fs4/risc_lab/scratch/jyeung/for_Hide/ATAC_deep_sequencing_Novogene_05072025/Centromeric_Repeat_Seq/count_kmers_in_fastq_verbose/output/Figures"
pdf(paste0(pdf_dir, "/M_WTvs43AvsHID_20mer_freq_in_dedup_fastq-reads.pdf"), width=8, height=4)
ggplot(hist_merged[!hist_merged$kmer_frequencies == 0, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, fill=sample, alpha=0.3), color="black")+
        geom_bar(stat="identity", position="identity",  color="black", size=0.1)+
        scale_fill_manual(values=colors)+
        facet_wrap(~Condition)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 20-mers found")+
        theme_minimal()
ggplot(hist_merged[!hist_merged$kmer_frequencies == 0, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, fill=sample))+
        geom_bar(stat="identity", size=0.1,  color="black")+
        scale_fill_manual(values=colors)+
        facet_wrap(Condition~sample)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 20-mers found")+
        theme_minimal()
ggplot(hist_merged[!hist_merged$kmer_frequencies == 0, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, color=sample,))+
        geom_line(stat="identity", position="identity", size=1)+
        scale_color_manual(values=colors)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 20-mers found")+
        theme_minimal()
ggplot(hist_merged[hist_merged$kmer_frequencies >= 5, ], aes(x=kmer_frequencies, y=Percent_total_reads, color=sample,))+
        geom_line(stat="identity", position="identity", size=1)+
        scale_color_manual(values=colors)+
        ylab("% Total Reads")+
        xlab("Number of 20-mers found >= 5")+
        theme_minimal()
dev.off()

Reads_with_kmers_stats <- lapply(hist, function(x){percent_no_kmers_reads <- x[x$kmer_frequencies ==0, ]$Percent_total_reads
                        percent_kmer_reads <- 100-percent_no_kmers_reads
                        num_kmer_reads <- sum(x[!x$kmer_frequencies ==0, ]$Number_of_reads)
                        df <- data.frame(Percent_kmer_reads=percent_kmer_reads, Number_of_kmer_reads=num_kmer_reads)
                        return(df)
                        })
Reads_with_kmers_stats <- do.call(rbind, Reads_with_kmers_stats)
Reads_with_kmers_stats$total_reads <- total_reads
Reads_with_kmers_stats
```
